stemHtml: Transporting medical personnel to a conflict area. After PAN PAN three times and "MEDICAL", what must you state?

options.a: Call sign, position, number/type of transports, route, ETA, cruising altitude, and frequencies guarded.
options.b: Call sign, position, ETA, and cargo description.
options.c: Call sign, position, route, altitude, and cargo.
options.d: Call sign, position, route, ETA, and cruising altitude.
